query:
SELECT
            AVG(apm)::DOUBLE PRECISION AS avg_apm,
            MAX(apm) AS peak_apm,
            AVG(eapm)::DOUBLE PRECISION AS avg_eapm
          FROM plugin_session_summaries
          WHERE user_id = $1
            AND started_at::date = $2
            AND ended_at IS NOT NULL
            AND apm IS NOT NULL
